prompt: CLI-Manager Web light theme tablet landscape UI. Airy white panels on #F4F8FE, blue #3978E8 primary, subtle borders and shadows, low-saturation utility colors. Responsive navigation rail, project sidebar, conversational workspace and execution drawer. Chinese developer collaboration app, no terminal, no branding, no watermark.

CLI-Manager Web light theme secure login page in an exact 3:2 landscape desktop browser canvas. Pale blue background spanning the full wide viewport, centered white sign-in card, geometric terminal mark, account login and SSO, trusted-browser security note, blue primary CTA. Minimal spacious Chinese UI, no marketing illustration, no watermark.

CLI-Manager Web light theme device pairing wizard. White card on pale blue background, four-step progress 登录 配对 授权 完成, six-digit code, QR option, expiry countdown and desktop instructions. Blue primary, amber security note, crisp Chinese, no watermark.

CLI-Manager Web light theme device authorization page. White security panel showing browser, Windows device, project and requested permissions 查看 操作 代码写入 管理. Clear explanations, amber high-risk warning, buttons 拒绝 and 确认授权, airy Chinese UI, no watermark.

CLI-Manager Web light theme offline state in full app shell. Selected DESKTOP-01 marked 离线, pale amber banner, last sync time, read-only project and conversation data, disabled write actions with tooltips, actions 等待重连 切换设备 查看诊断. White panels, blue accent, Chinese, no watermark.

CLI-Manager Web light theme approval conversation state. Prominent pale amber approval card with device, project, Worktree, command npm run check, risk, expiry, buttons 允许一次 本会话允许 拒绝. Timeline paused at 待审批, white panels and blue navigation, Chinese, no terminal, no watermark.

CLI-Manager Web light project overview. White dashboard cards on pale blue page, project CLI-Manager/master healthy, metrics active tasks sessions today Token Git changes, CLI Hook provider status, recent Worktrees and conversations. Blue actions 新建对话 新建Worktree 打开文件, Chinese, no watermark.
